SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.service.data.api
Package com.hack23.cia.service.data.api

Interface IntelligenceExportService

public interface IntelligenceExportService
Service interface for exporting intelligence products as JSON. Provides JSON export capabilities for risk assessments, coalition alignment, and temporal trends to support CDN-ready static file generation and API endpoints.
Since:
v1.36 (Intelligence Products JSON Export)
Author:
intelligence-operative

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    java.lang.String
    exportCoalitionAlignment()
    Export coalition alignment matrix showing voting alignment between parties.
    java.lang.String
    exportRiskAssessments()
    Export risk assessment data for all rule violations.
    java.lang.String
    exportTemporalTrends()
    Export temporal trend analysis with daily/weekly/monthly/annual patterns.
    void
    writeJsonToFile(java.lang.String jsonContent, java.lang.String fileName, java.lang.String outputDirectory)
    Write JSON export to file for CDN deployment.

  • Method Details

    • exportRiskAssessments

      java.lang.String exportRiskAssessments() throws java.io.IOException
      Export risk assessment data for all rule violations. Generates JSON containing all 50 risk rules with their current violations, severity levels, and affected entities (politicians, parties, committees, ministries).
      Returns:
      JSON string containing risk assessment data
      Throws:
      java.io.IOException - if JSON generation fails

    • exportCoalitionAlignment

      java.lang.String exportCoalitionAlignment() throws java.io.IOException
      Export coalition alignment matrix showing voting alignment between parties. Generates JSON containing pairwise party alignment rates, total votes, and aligned votes for coalition stability analysis.
      Returns:
      JSON string containing coalition alignment matrix
      Throws:
      java.io.IOException - if JSON generation fails

    • exportTemporalTrends

      java.lang.String exportTemporalTrends() throws java.io.IOException
      Export temporal trend analysis with daily/weekly/monthly/annual patterns. Generates JSON containing decision volumes, approval rates, moving averages, and year-over-year comparisons for trend forecasting.
      Returns:
      JSON string containing temporal trends data
      Throws:
      java.io.IOException - if JSON generation fails

    • writeJsonToFile

      void writeJsonToFile(java.lang.String jsonContent, java.lang.String fileName, java.lang.String outputDirectory) throws java.io.IOException
      Write JSON export to file for CDN deployment. Note: Subdirectories are not supported. The fileName parameter must be a flat file name without path separators. Path traversal sequences are validated and rejected.
      Parameters:
      jsonContent - the JSON content to write
      fileName - the file name (e.g., "risk-assessments.json") - must not contain path separators
      outputDirectory - the output directory path
      Throws:
      java.io.IOException - if file write fails or directory creation fails
      java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if fileName contains path separators or path traversal is detected
